semantic.role: LLM transport provider for OpenAI-compatible APIs. Implements the LLMTransport interface to make chat completion requests through the OpenAI SDK.
responsibilities: Initialize and configure the OpenAI client with credentials, base URL, and timeout from ProviderConfig.
Invoke chat completion requests via the OpenAI SDK and return structured responses.
Parse response payloads (choices, message content, usage tokens) and map them to the internal UsageInfo structure.
Expose as a pluggable provider under the LLM transport abstraction for dynamic selection by the factory.
outOfScope: Prompt construction or generation – this is a thin API caller only.
Error retry or fallback logic – handled by retry wrappers or higher layers.
Response formatting or rendering – output is raw structured data.
Logging, auditing, or credential management – external to this provider.
invariants: Must implement the LLMTransport interface from ../base.ts.
Uses the OpenAI SDK as the sole underlying HTTP client.
Does not perform prompt generation or response parsing beyond extracting structured fields.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide an OpenAI-compatible LLM transport implementation as part of the pluggable provider architecture.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Package maintenance release; no functional changes to this provider.

publicSurface.description: Implements the LLMTransport interface for OpenAI-compatible chat completion API calls. Consumed by the LLM transport layer (factory or runtime).
